channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Large fly tipping mess in front of house, 18th May
item.description:
Large amount of fly tipping had been sitting here for a few weeks. Just at the beginning of Maud Cashmore way.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Maud Cashmore Way, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overhanging bushes, trees encroaching over the public footpath, from the majority of the properties on Westmoreland Road, 17th May
item.description:
Overhanging bushes from the majority of properties/ flats reducing the pavement width on Westmoreland Road. Needs urgent attention as a sign of neglect, need cutting back
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 80, Westmoreland Road, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 17th May
item.description:
Please collect!

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Dalston Lane, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Southill Woods is unkemp, overgrown, full of weeds stinging nettles and neglected by the council., 17th May
item.description:
South Hill Woods is a disgrace. Unkemp, overgrown, full of weeds stinging nettles etc and basically ignored by the parks department . Please tidy it up as this is not a suitable memorial to Q E 2. Thank you in anticipation.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Tootswood Road, Park Langley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping outside garvey house, 17th May
item.description:
Flytipping and rubbish in front of metal bin based outside Garvey House, Southwold Rd, E5
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Dennington Close, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping outside gaines house, southwold rd, e5, 17th May
item.description:
Flytipping and rubbish on the floor in front of metal bins based outside Gaines House, Southwold Rd, E5
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Dennington Close, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bin chambers need to be cleared., 17th May
item.description:
Couple of Bin chambers of Torren and Cross courts found filled up needs to ne cleared on priority.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1-36, Denmark Hill, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly-tipping, 17th May
item.description:
Hi there, Please remove that fridge a d shopping troyadap. Best, L

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Gurdon Road, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly-tipping issue, 17th May
item.description:
Hi there, Please remove that trolley with random clothing. It has been there for weeks now. Best, L

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Gurdon Road, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overflowing bin - ongoing issue, 17th May
item.description:
Hi there, Bins ought to be changed daily and this one is often missed. Please ensure this is improved otherwise I'll complain to the council. Best, Lidia

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Gurdon Road, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bed matters left on the pavement out no 12, 17th May
item.description:
Hi there, This matters has been dumped there for the last two weeks. Please address it asap. Best, L

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Fairthorn Road, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bags by bin, 17th May
item.description:
Bags by bin
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cambridge Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bin full, 17th May
item.description:
Bin full
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cambridge Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: No MOT Abandoned eyesore, 17th May
item.description:
This car has been parked here since last year and has not MOT. It is an eyesore. It has damage on it and doesn’t look like it’s in a drivable state. Its been taking up unnecessary space

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Nightingale Place, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Two flyposters are on the pelican crossing guard railings on Anerley Hill 2m from the jct with Crystal Palace Station Road., 17th May
item.description:
Two flyposters are on the pelican crossing guard railings on Anerley Hill 2m from the jct with Crystal Palace Station Road. Seen from moving vehicle 16/5/26

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Anerley Road, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Extra blue bin at 131 Kirkwood, 17th May
item.description:
I have moved into a new house and have two large blue bins - please can you take one? I only need one.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kirkwood Road, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rotting waste not emptied, 17th May
item.description:
This bin is routinely ignored during every weekly cleanse. Residents assume it is a food/garden waste bin. And maybe it is not. But it attracts rats and vermin. Can it please be emptied or just totally remove the entire bin? Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Fulthorp Road, Blackheath
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned fridge, most likely abandoned by 4 Brinkworth Way, 17th May
item.description:
Abandoned fridge, most likely abandoned by 4 Brinkworth Way.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Mallard Close, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Masses of potholes, 17th May
item.description:
There are masses of potholes and very uneven road surface due to numerous today works in recent months.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Crown Lane, Southborough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blocking fire access and double yellow blips, 17th May
item.description:
Blocking emergency access and driveway double yellow line with blips

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kyverdale Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet
